from google import genai
from google.genai import types

client = genai.Client\(api_key='AIzaSyBsqovba8xFrYzH6maHsvvqVxTPo8I4jRU'\)

response = client.models.generate_content\(
    model='gemini-2.0-flash-exp-image-generation',
    contents=['Generate a cinematic image: A golden savannah landscape with a lion'],
    config=types.GenerateContentConfig\(
        response_modalities=['TEXT', 'IMAGE'],
    \),
\)

found_image = False
if response.candidates and response.candidates[0].content and response.candidates[0].content.parts:
    for part in response.candidates[0].content.parts:
        if part.inline_data is not None:
            print\(f'Image received! Size: {len\(part.inline_data.data\)} bytes, type: {part.inline_data.mime_type}'\)
            found_image = True
        elif part.text:
            print\(f'Text: {part.text[:100]}'\)

if not found_image:
    print\('No image in response'\)
    print\(f'Response: {response}'\)
" 2>&1)
